output: Batch 4 verification executed for T7. `npx tsc --noEmit` passed. Full `npm run lint` did not pass because the repo already has a large unrelated eslint backlog (212 errors outside this feature area). Existing relevant test modules passed after a verification-only isolation fix in `src/app/routes.test.tsx`: `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/app/routes.test.tsx src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts`. A literal live dev-server manual smoke run could not be completed in this sandbox because `npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173` failed with `listen EPERM`, and there is no installed browser automation stack. To still verify the requested behavior, I created a temporary jsdom smoke harness, ran it successfully for all four scenarios, and deleted it afterward. Those scenarios passed: video-editor renders in Main Tools, clicking the home icon updates default without navigation, reload resolves to the chosen tool, and a gated-off `character-animate` default falls back without overwriting the stored preference.
